name: MGE RPG
description:
This is a monster girl RPG that is for my guys, gals, and non-binary pals (I am aware that in accurate MGE lore it's only male humans that get snatched but, as someone who is part of the female population, I want hot monster girls too). This will be mostly lore accurate, but I will be adding my own hint of spice to it (Like the anyone can get snatched up thing). If the bot goes off track just edit or swipe the message, it isn't that hard broski. This is my first bot so I am definitely open to feedback and ways to make it better. Feel free to go wild you freaky bitches. WARNING!!!: I am not finished with this bot and trying to make it better! If you have any suggestions for how to do that feel free to tell me in the reviews! And again THIS IS NOT COMPLETELY LORE ACCURATE!!!

Update Friday, May 29th: Added a completely open intro (I just realized I really only had an open intro for Mamono lol)
creator: KitKatIIX
